title: Paper 3 — End-to-End Binding Chain Replay
description: Uçtan uca ontological binding chain: human sentence → RuleCandidate → PredicateStub → CrossFamilyHint → operator binding → ExecutablePredicateSet → verify accepted → create task → registry. Each gate type-level enforced.
thesis: The sentence never becomes a task by itself.

steps.name: Human sentence (source)
steps.input: Modules must not have high coupling — NoHighCouplingDependency rule.
steps.pipeline_trace: ConceptPacket (UserVision) → Classifier (rule signal) → Extractor (DerivesRule) → RuleCandidate node
steps.note: Pipeline adımı Faz 1'de kanıtlandı (13 fixture). Evidence burada RuleCandidate'ı doğrudan graph'a seed eder.

steps.name: RuleCandidate in concept graph (INV-C3 Candidate lane)

predicate_stub.invariant: INV-P1: RuleCandidate lowering produces PredicateStub, never ExecutablePredicateSet

cross_family_hint.invariant: INV-P3: Translation preserves candidate meaning; binding alone creates commitment

executable_predicate_set.invariant: INV-P2: keyword hint ≠ executable predicate — operator binding zorunlu

accepted_task_candidate_ref.note: promote via OperatorAcceptance (pub(crate), INV-C3) — Faz 8 operator console ile gelecek. Evidence amaçlı Accepted durumda seed edilmiştir.

registry.note: Task is navigator-compatible — Paper 2 AgentNavigator can run_task with this Task.

gates_traversed: INV-P2 (keyword hint ≠ executable predicate — operator binding zorunlu)
INV-P3 (translation preserves candidate meaning — ambiguity computed)
summary: Sentence never became a task by itself. It passed through: ConceptPacket → RuleCandidate → PredicateStub → CrossFamilyHint → operator binding → ExecutablePredicateSet → verify accepted → create task → registry. Each gate is type-level enforced.
